name: transcript-to-notebooklm
description: Convert .srt / .vtt subtitle files or any timestamped video transcript into clean, timestamp-free .txt, then create a new NotebookLM notebook (prompting for its name) and upload the cleaned files as sources. Strips cue indices, timecodes, and formatting tags, de-dups rolling captions, reflows into readable paragraphs, and passes already-clean transcripts through untouched, so a whole mixed folder converts in one pass. Uploads are paced and idempotent to survive NotebookLM rate limits.
